subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Husayn 1
subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! Hearken unto My call from the precincts of My prison, that it may attract thee to the Kingdom of My Cause and the dominion of My majesty. Verily, thy Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا حسین اسمع ندائی من شطر سجنی لیجذبک الی ملکوت امری و جبروت عظمتی ان ربک
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @predictions and prophecies, @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @personal instructions
